mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO daily_inspection_frequency
daily_inspection_table_id, frequency_code, area_device_name, inspection_content, inspection_standard, data_type, cycle_unit, frequency_value, month_date_set, week_date_set, shifts_set, maximums, minimums, creator_id, created_at, updated_at,
#{dailyInspectionTableId}, #{frequencyCode}, #{areaDeviceName}, #{inspectionContent}, #{inspectionStandard}, #{dataType}, #{cycleUnit}, #{frequencyValue}, #{monthDateSet}, #{weekDateSet}, #{shiftsSet}, #{maximums}, #{minimums}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.select:
SELECT dif.id, dif.daily_inspection_table_id AS dailyInspectionTableId, dif.frequency_code, dif.area_device_name, dif.inspection_content, dif.inspection_standard, dif.data_type, dif.cycle_unit, dif.frequency_value, dif.month_date_set, dif.week_date_set, dif.shifts_set, dif.maximums, dif.minimums, dif.creator_id, dif.created_at AS createdAt, dif.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM daily_inspection_frequency dif WHERE dif.id = #{id}
AND dif.creator_id = #{creatorId}
